title: Smoky Red Curry Salad
description: A flavorful and refreshing salad made with smoky chicken, red bell peppers, and a hint of curry. Perfect for a light and easy meal.
instructions: Grill the chicken breast until cooked through, about 5-7 minutes per side.
Slice the red bell pepper into thin strips.
In a small bowl, mix together the curry powder and olive oil.
Brush the curry mixture onto the grilled chicken breast.
In a large bowl, combine the mixed greens salad, sliced red bell pepper, and grilled chicken breast.
Drizzle the red wine vinegar over the salad and toss to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
